name: Earth Spirit
description: Through conflict, one's nature is revealed.

abilities.name: Stone Remnant
abilities.description: Self-targeting the ability places the Stone Remnant within melee range. The ability passively grants Kaolin attack damage bonus per unused charge. Additionally, grants a greater unstackable attack damage bonus buff whenever Kaolin targets a Stone Remnant with an ability (does not stack).

abilities.name: Boulder Smash
abilities.description: Smashes the target enemy or allied unit, sending them in the direction he is facing. The traveling unit damages all enemy units it hits.

abilities.name: Rolling Boulder
abilities.description: Gathers himself into a boulder and rolls toward the target location after a slight delay, deals damage and stuns enemy units. Earth Spirit will stop if he collides with an enemy hero or when being disabled.

abilities.name: Geomagnetic Grip
abilities.description: Pulls the targeted allied or enemy unit. Enemy units struck by the pulled target will be silenced. Increases both the ally pull speed and ally cast range. Reduces cooldown.

abilities.name: Enchant Remnant
abilities.description: Can be cast on Stone Remnants, and has a lower cooldown when used that way. The Stone Remnant cannot expire while being Enchanted. However, it is immediately destroyed once the Enchantment expires.

abilities.name: Magnetize
abilities.description: Magnetizes enemy units in a small nearby area, causing them to take damage for a short duration. Magnetized heroes cause nearby Stone Remnants to explode, destroying the remnant and refreshing Magnetize's duration on all nearby enemies. This process can repeat multiple times.
